name: Florida Bouillabaisse
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Fish fillets, cut into pieces
2 Softshell turtles, cleaned and parboiled until tender
6 Blue crabs, boiled and meat removed or one 7-1/2 oz. can crabmeat
12 Clams or one 7-1/2 oz. can chopped clams
1 medium Onion, sliced and 1/2 cup diced green onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute vegetables in oil until soft, about 10 minutes.
2. Add white wine, fish stock, tomatoes and bring to a boil.
3. Add fish and remaining ingredients. Cook over medium heat for 15 minutes.
4. Turn off heat and simmer on low for 20 minutes.
